prompt:
A clean premium wellness-brand PRODUCT SHOT on a PURE WHITE background, 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Hero product photography style with minimal floating text and graphic callouts. Generous breathing room.

HERO SUBJECT — centered: photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, gold lid). A small ceramic dish to the right of the jar holds 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES; another 2-3 cubes scattered casually on the white surface in front of the jar.

FLOATING ELEMENTS — a clean mineral-chip cluster floating around the jar:
  • Above the jar — a single LARGE bold headline in deep ink-black: '92 ESSENTIAL MINERALS' (bold condensed display sans-serif all-caps). A small teal underline sweep beneath. Tiny sub-line: 'From wild-harvested sea moss.'
  • Floating around the jar (NOT overlapping) — 8 small mineral-chip pills arranged in a loose circular constellation: each pill is a small teal-outlined rounded rectangle containing a bold ALL-CAPS mineral abbreviation (Fe, Mg, Ca, K, Zn, I, Cu, Se) and a tiny sub-label below in gray (IRON, MAGNESIUM, CALCIUM, POTASSIUM, ZINC, IODINE, COPPER, SELENIUM). Thin gold dotted connector lines link a few of the pills toward the jar.
  • Below the jar — three short pill-shaped feature tags in a row: 'PLANT-BASED' · 'VEGAN' · 'NON-GMO' (small teal-outlined pills with tiny flat teal icons).

BOTTOM — tiny tagline in tracked light-gray all-caps: 'TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE'.

DESIGN SYSTEM:
  • Background: pure clean white with very subtle warm-gray paper texture.
  • Accent colors: muted TEAL/CYAN, warm GOLD/YELLOW, deep INK-BLACK type, warm-gray sub-text.
  • Typography: bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif for headlines/labels, clean modern sans-serif for body. NO script fonts.
  • Mood: editorial wellness-brand hero shot — Athletic Greens / Hims / Apple product-page aesthetic. Clean, premium, focused on the product.

ABSOLUTE RULES:
  • All text MUST be cleanly spelled, no garbled letters, no AI-text artifacts.
  • 1:1 square, 4K, pure white background, NO border, NO frame.
  • Reference the provided image for brand color/type and jar appearance.
